_comment: CLAP backend — minimum-privilege IAM policy for S3 storage (E4).
Apply this policy to the IAM user / role whose credentials are stored in:
1. AWS Console → IAM → Policies → Create Policy → JSON tab
3. Replace BUCKET_NAME with your actual S3 bucket name
4. Attach to the IAM user that holds S3_ACCESS_KEY_ID
This policy grants ONLY what the CLAP backend requires:
- GetObject    : read audio and PDF files (presigned URL serving)
- PutObject    : write new audio recordings and generated PDFs
- DeleteObject : delete audio files when a submission is removed
- ListBucket   : needed for health checks and directory listing
- iam:*, ec2:*, rds:* or any other AWS service
